name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Boys night

"I miss my wife, I'm going home."

.

(he's 27 here)

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

Ahhh, hello!! I promise I'm not dead, I just had a lot of things going on. Unfortunately the summer holiday is nearing towards its end which means less time to do absolutely anything 😔😔😔

.

I'm hitting you with some fluff Bakubot, him being a sucker for his wifey. It is inspired by a short comic I saw on Pinterest the other day, so don't be surprised when you came across something similar while scrolling through that app.

.

Anyway, have fun with your hubby! ˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.
